# Support Policy

## What Support Is For

Use support channels for:

- installation/setup questions
- API usage and integration guidance
- troubleshooting expected behavior

## Where to Ask

- usage/help: open a GitHub issue and label clearly (question, help wanted, integration)
- reproducible bugs: use the bug report issue template
- feature ideas: use the feature request issue template

## Response Boundaries

Support is best-effort and maintainer-capacity dependent.

This project does not currently promise:

- guaranteed response times
- production incident/on-call coverage
- custom app consulting

## Before Opening Support Requests

Please include:

- React Native version and platform
- package version
- reproduction steps or minimal example
- logs/errors/screenshots when applicable

For security concerns, do not use support channels. Follow [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md).
